title: Flaky Fried Spanish Savoy Cabbage Crema Catalana
description: A savory and dense Spanish dish featuring savoy cabbage, deep fried to a crispy perfection, served in a romantic crema catalana form on a wooden board, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the shredded savoy cabbage, all purpose flour, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the cabbage mixture into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the fried cabbage from the oil and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice and water.
Brush the wooden board with the lemon juice mixture.
Arrange the fried cabbage on the wooden board in a crema catalana form.
